title: AFI EnrichmentProvenance v1 (District 2 M1 DRAFT)
description: DRAFT / NON-IMPLEMENTATION per-lane enrichment provenance record. One object describes one enrichment lane run: which lane, which engine, which versions, how replayable it is, and which evidence/sources it drew on. This formalizes the generic lane-provenance concept only — it deliberately does NOT canonize any strategy-specific (e.g. Froggy) lane fields or payloads.
$comment: asOf/fetchedAt are normalized evidence/domain timestamps (admissible per District 2 hash doctrine). Runtime/storage timestamps (startedAt, finishedAt, storedAt, ...) are lane-runtime metadata and are rejected by additionalProperties:false.
x-afiPartOf: AFI District 2 — Canonical Data & Provenance Boundary (D2 M1)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: District 2 D-17 decision — authorizes D2 M1 only (afi-config schema drafts and tests)

x-afiOpenItems.EP-O1: Lane id namespace/registry — OPEN; opaque non-empty string in this draft.
x-afiOpenItems.EP-O2: status lifecycle taxonomy — draft enum, expected to evolve.

laneId.description: Identifier of the enrichment lane this record describes (e.g. 'price-context', 'liquidity-depth').

engineId.description: Identifier of the enrichment engine that executed the lane.

laneVersion.description: Version of the lane definition/logic that produced this output.

engineVersion.description: OPTIONAL version of the engine runtime, where distinct from laneVersion.

provisional.description: OPTIONAL flag: true when the lane output is provisional (subject to later confirmation or re-enrichment).

replayabilityLevel.description: How replayable this lane's output is. 'deterministic' = byte-identical re-derivation; 'pinned-inputs' = replayable from pinned snapshots/hashes; 'best-effort' = approximate replay only; 'non-replayable' = cannot be replayed.

asOf.description: Normalized domain timestamp the lane output is valid for (e.g. the market time the enrichment describes).

fetchedAt.description: Normalized evidence timestamp: when the lane's external inputs were fetched, as supplied by the fetch record.

evidenceRefs.description: References (evidenceId values) to EvidenceRef v1 objects backing this lane output. Full EvidenceRef objects travel in the enclosing envelope/record.

sourceDisclosureRefs.description: References (sourceId values) to SourceDisclosureProfile v1 objects for the sources this lane consumed.

laneOutputHash.description: OPTIONAL CanonicalHash v1 of the lane's canonical output payload (the payload itself stays off-object).

notes.description: OPTIONAL free-form notes about the lane run (e.g. degradation reasons).
